## Checklist

- [ ] This PR targets **`Dev`** (not `main` — `main` is release-only)
- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally (typecheck + lint + tests + build)
- [ ] No real IPs, hostnames, credentials, or personal data — [placeholders only](../CONTRIBUTING.md#placeholder--redaction-conventions) (`192.168.255.x`, `node-a`)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests where practical
